channel.title: Portuguese on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Portuguese on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Portugrill
item.description: Summary The food here was just like one of those casual fast food centric places. It’s on Seamless (food delivery service), so enough said. The churrasco was $18 and was mildly satisfying. They gave you a decent amount of meat, and it was quite tender when ordered “medium rare”. It came with this mayonnaise like green sauce, that had only a mild kick to it. With this, I opted for french fries and pineapple on the side.
